briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the collapse of fintech middleware company Synapse, highlighting custodial risk in banking-as-a-service models.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple has acquired UK-based open banking startup Credit Kudos, signalling the tech giant's growing interest in financial data and credit assessment.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep-dive analysis explores how open banking frameworks are reshaping competitive dynamics in the payments industry.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is driving increasingly unconventional credit card products, blurring the lines between lending, rewards, and embedded finance.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Wealthsimple partners with Elon Musk's X for direct stock trading via social media](https://betakit.com/wealthsimple-partners-with-elon-musks-x-for-direct-stock-trading-via-social-media/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian fintech leader Wealthsimple has announced a partnership with X (formerly Twitter) to enable direct stock trading through the social media platform.

- **[Common Wealth secures $12-million Series A to help deliver workplace retirement plans](https://betakit.com/common-wealth-secures-12-million-series-a-to-help-deliver-workplace-retirement-plans/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian fintech Common Wealth has raised a $12-million Series A round to expand its platform delivering accessible workplace retirement savings plans.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — Canada flagged screen scraping as a security risk and set an open banking implementation target, underscoring the country's ongoing journey toward a consumer-driven banking framework.

- **[Carney temporarily suspending federal fuel excise tax on gas, diesel and aviation fuel](https://www.cbc.ca/news/politics/carney-fuel-excise-tax-affordability-9.7162911?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Prime Minister Carney has announced a temporary suspension of the federal fuel excise tax as an affordability measure amid rising energy prices linked to the Iran conflict.

- **[Cohere exec pledges AI firm will stay Canadian-headquartered amid merger reports](https://betakit.com/cohere-exec-pledges-ai-firm-will-stay-canadian-headquartered-amid-merger-reports/)** — *BetaKit* — A senior Cohere executive has publicly committed to keeping the AI company headquartered in Canada despite ongoing merger speculation, a signal of importance to the broader Canadian tech ecosystem.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[SAGA Metals Executes Title Transfer Agreement to Expand Wolverine Heavy Rare Earth Element Project in Labrador](https://financialpost.com/globe-newswire/saga-metals-executes-title-transfer-agreement-to-expand-wolverine-heavy-rare-earth-element-project-in-labrador-grab-sample-assays-included-up-to-21-6-treo)** — *Financial Post* — SAGA Metals Corp. is expanding its rare earth element project in Labrador, a development relevant to Atlantic Canadian resource investment and the growing role of capital markets and venture financing in the region.

- **[Common Wealth secures $12-million Series A to help deliver workplace retirement plans](https://betakit.com/common-wealth-secures-12-million-series-a-to-help-deliver-workplace-retirement-plans/)** — *BetaKit* — Common Wealth's Series A raise is directly relevant to Atlantic Fintech's financial inclusion focus, as accessible workplace retirement solutions are critically underserved among small and mid-sized employers across Atlantic Canada.

- **[Fintech dystopia](https://fintechdystopia.com/)** — *Hacker News* — This critical perspective on the darker side of fintech serves as a useful counterpoint for ecosystem builders in Atlantic Canada thinking carefully about consumer protection, trust, and responsible innovation.
